title: FNAF Requires Security
description: Five night's at Freddy's Requires Security A fnaf mod
body:
- The mod requires Geckolib

- The mod "Five nights at Freddy's requires security" adds such things and mechanics to minecraft as: Freddy Fazber, who sleeps during the day and wakes up at random at night, the main thing is not to miss it. Freddy can walk around the nearest location. Freddy also has his own screamer if you approach him at night. By killing Freddy, only experience drops from him

- Also, without leaving Freddie's side, we have such items as:
Freddy's Radar The object can show the nearest Freddy if he is nearby, but only at night. Uses 2
Electro-shocker It can stun any entity, immobilizing and blinding it also works on Freddy's animatronics. Uses 3
Ratator It allows you to turn Freddy, you just need to aim at Freddy's legs We also have the record "The March of Ecuador on musical blocks"

- We have a chewing gum machine and a key to it. You can put a bronze phase coin in the machine and it will give you chewing gums. You can use the key to look at the coins in the slot machine, if they are there, take them all

- And we also have phase coins Bronze, Silver, Gold , they can be spent at the guard or in a machine with chewing gum

- We have a new trader: The Guard To get it, you need to put a closet with a resident and he can take the profession of a security guard There is still a lot of decor in fashion, but I think everything is clear with this

- The leader of the MrWish team wrote
